commit_message:
Add GPMC(AAD) to WBM interface module Add GPMC(AAD) to WBM interface module The interface is compatible with the existing GPMC to WBM module, so they are interchangeable (provided that the address bus width is properly adjusted in the design). It supports single word and burst access. Asynchronous mode is not supported.

Although not originally intended, the interface also works in AD mode.

I can also provide the kernel patches to the GPMC driver and the device tree (based on v3.14).

Some fixe

examples.patch:
@@ -131,7 +131,7 @@ ram0 : dpram_NxN
  		we => write_mem ,
  		di => wbs_writedata, 
 		a	=> wbs_address ,
- 		dpra => X"0000",
+		dpra => (others => '0'),
 		spo => wbs_readdata,
 		dpo => open 		
 	);
